commands.review_summary:
Adds hub-delegated persistent ACP sessions via `sessions_spawn(delegate:true)`, label-based `sessions_send` and `sessions_list`, `/acp delegate` operator commands, lifecycle cleanup, protocol/config/docs updates, and tests.

PR surface: Source +1553, Tests +2069, Docs +404, Config 0, Other +16. Total +4042 across 71 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: from source, close removes only `hubDelegated`, then `sessions_send(label=...)` can fall back to `spawnedBy` label resolution and target the same markerless row. I did not run the full gateway scenario because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow, source-proven lifecycle bug in delegate close and label resolution that an automated repair can attempt.
